reason: Cross-package change touches shared types, API, runner, and web; include thinking guides for reuse and layer boundaries.
Shared AgentBackendKind/project types and API DTO contracts will change.
Web consumes shared DTO/type semantics for backend labels and stream events.
API must persist project backend config, expose preflight/status endpoints, and keep stream routes stable.
Runner backend resolution, CLI preflight, fail-fast behavior, and event emission are central to this task.
Web UI needs project-level backend selection/status and streaming log presentation updates.
